scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && node --check markdownlint-rules.js && node --check markdownlint-hlprs.js && node --check load-cli2-config.cjs && node --check scripts/cli2-overrides.cjs && node --check scripts/sync-cli2-config.cjs && node --check bin/lint-markdown.cjs && node --check check-function-order.cjs && node --check tests/helpers.cjs && node --check tests/examples.test.cjs && node --check tests/hlprs.test.cjs && node --check tests/run-all.cjs && node --check tests/test-cli2-config.cjs && node --check tests/test-markdownlint-ignore.cjs && node --check tests/test-markdown-tables.cjs && node --check tests/test-rules-consistency.cjs && node --check tests/rules/minimum-h2-heading.test.cjs && node --check tests/rules/list-items-end-with-semicolon-or-colon.test.cjs && node --check tests/rules/list-blank-line-spacing.test.cjs && node --check tests/rules/list-preceded-by-colon.test.cjs && node --check tests/rules/codeblock-preceded-by-colon.test.cjs && node --check tests/rules/no-leading-spaces.test.cjs && node --check tests/rules/sentences-end-with-mark.test.cjs && node check-function-order.cjs
scripts.test: node tests/run-all.cjs && node tests/test-cli2-config.cjs && node tests/test-markdownlint-ignore.cjs && node tests/test-markdown-tables.cjs && node tests/test-rules-consistency.cjs && node check-function-order.cjs
